reviews.review_description:
Purchased this title and spent some time playing it initially.  However, following an update I lost all my progress to date and ended up having to start all over again. Has anyone else had this issue and is there a resolution? 
I love the game, the puzzle aspect, and the graphics, but losing my progress has influenced my rating!

developer_response.body:
Hi Pocococo7068, thank you for your review, and we’re very sorry that your progress appears to have been lost after the update. We understand how frustrating that is.

We’ve recently received a similar report. As a first step, please try Meta’s cloud backup restore for Hidden Pictures: Agent Q, as your previous save data may still be recoverable there.

If the issue continues, please contact us through our Discord support channel with your device details and the approximate time you noticed the problem. While we’re unable to restore individual save data directly, we will do our best to assist you.

Thank you as well for your kind words about the game, puzzles, and graphics. We’re truly sorry this affected your experience.

reviews.review_description: A really enjoyable game – the dioramas are beautiful! Some of the puzzles are quite tricky. There’s loads of content! It took me nearly 10 hours to complete all the levels 100%!

developer_response.body:
Hi Zbych04, thank you so much for the lovely review 😊
We’re really happy to hear you enjoyed the game and spent so much time exploring all of the levels to reach 100% completion. It means a lot to us that you appreciated the dioramas, the puzzle challenge, and the amount of content we prepared.
Thank you again for playing Hidden Pictures: Agent Q and for sharing your kind feedback with us!

reviews.review_title: Cute game, puzzles a bit random & samey
reviews.review_description: The match game is not displaying the items so cannot progress. The game itself is just OK. The random, barely logical item swapping puzzles get a bit repetitive. The setting is nice and cute.

developer_response.body:
Hi Mic_Shortcut,

Thank you very much for taking the time to leave a review and share your feedback.

We sincerely apologize for the issue where the match puzzle items were not displayed, which prevented progress. This problem has now been fixed and addressed in the latest patch.

We also appreciate your feedback about some puzzles feeling repetitive or a bit random. We will continue reviewing puzzle design and work to improve variety and overall gameplay flow in future updates.

Thank you as well for your kind words about the game's setting and style. We truly appreciate your support and will keep working to provide a better experience.

Thanks again for your valuable feedback!

reviews.review_description: Control issues are fixed, now I can enjoy this diorama game. Well done, devs!

developer_response.body:
Hi Christian667, thank you so much for staying with us and continuing to share your feedback along the way 😊
You’ve been incredibly helpful in pointing out issues through multiple updates, so it means a lot to hear that the control improvements made the experience better for you.
We’re truly grateful for your patience, your honest feedback, and your continued support for Hidden Pictures: Agent Q!

reviews.review_description:
I seemed to be stuck for ever at the training and the blue orb. I  restarted so many times I could have wept.

After many attempts at this I finally passed this stage. The dioramas are excellent. I will comment furthervafter playing more. The glitch is the one thing so far that prevents me from giving a higher rating

developer_response.body:
Thank you very much for your thoughtful feedback.

We sincerely apologize for the confusion and frustration caused by the blue orb movement during the tutorial section. This issue has already been identified by our team, and a revision to the blue orb movement and tutorial flow is planned to make the experience clearer and more intuitive. 

We truly appreciate your persistence in getting through the section, and we understand how frustrating that experience must have been. We’re also very grateful for your kind words about the dioramas.

Your feedback is helping us improve the early gameplay experience, and we’ll continue working to ensure a smoother and more enjoyable journey moving forward. Thank you for playing Hidden Pictures: Agent Q.

reviews.review_description: I purchased this game yesterday and I really want to play it.  I’ve started 5 times and the game will not save my progress. What can I do?  Please help. I even uninstalled ( I’m a computer consultant) and reinstalled. Still, no luck.

developer_response.body:
Hi BJWoobie,

First of all, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you’ve experienced.

We have confirmed the issue where game progress is not being saved, and our team is currently investigating the root cause. We are working to resolve this as quickly as possible.

In the meantime, we kindly ask that you make sure to exit the game through a proper/normal shutdown rather than a forced or abnormal exit, as this may help prevent the issue temporarily.

Once again, we truly apologize for the trouble, and we appreciate your patience while we work on a fix.

Thank you.

reviews.review_description: If you like puzzle games like Curious Tale of the Stolen Pets, Down the Rabbit Hole  and Lego Bricktales, you'll love this game! Lots of scenes and amazing graphics.  Youll get lost in the little worlds as you imprison the Tumai and save the Muddles. Very creative and immersive game. Got it on sale but its worth the full price!

developer_response.body:
💛 Kimbiecookie, thank you so much for such a lovely review!
We’re thrilled that you enjoyed exploring the tiny worlds of Agent Q and meeting the Muddles and Tumai 🐾
Your words truly mean a lot to our team — we hope you’ll keep cherishing this little world for a long time 💫

reviews.review_description: I love this game. It's just so cute and it's nice & chill for my lazy @ss. There really needs to be merch made for the adorable Tumai Space Pirates!

developer_response.body:
Hey TattooedDoll1!
Thank you so much for the lovely message — it sprinkled a little stardust on our whole team today 💖✨

We’re so happy to hear that spending time with the Tumai Space Pirates brings you joy.
And about those Tumai figurines… if the stars line up just right, we would love to make them someday. Your comment definitely gives us an extra nudge to dream bigger 🌠

Please keep cheering for our tiny universe — we promise to keep filling it with charm, surprises, and lots of heart.
Thank you again, and we hope you stay with us for a long time! 💛

reviews.review_description:
I never write reviews, but Wow! What a beautiful and cool game. The themes are fantastic and obviously great developers.

I was working to get to the Halloween puzzles, and halfway there…they throw in Halloween themes!!!

Well done!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your amazing review, RalphE! 🎃💛
We’re thrilled that you enjoyed the Halloween surprises and our themes along the way. Your kind words mean a lot to our small team — we’ll keep working hard to bring you even more fun updates! 👀✨

reviews.review_title: These devs know how to support their app
reviews.review_description: Love the Halloween update. This game is nice and relaxing, the characters are adorable, and most of all, the game oozes polish. If a laid back puzzle game is what you are looking for, you won’t find any fault with this one.

developer_response.body:
hank you so much, guessed! 🎃💛
We’re so happy that you enjoyed the Halloween update and felt the relaxing charm of Agent Q.
Your warm words mean a lot to our small team. Please keep enjoying your cozy moments with Agent Q — we hope it stays one of your favorite little worlds for a long time. 🌟

reviews.review_description:
This is simply a great puzzle game. I would rank it the best on quest in this category. The detail in the puzzles and the 007 buzz is awesome

You don't want to miss this one.

developer_response.body:
Thank you, xman7! 🕵️‍♂️
We’re glad Agent Q passed your “best on Quest” mission report. The 007 buzz is something we love too, and your support keeps our team motivated to create even more secret adventures. Stay sharp, Agent!

reviews.review_description:
I took a punt and thought I’d not enjoy this but I’m loving it so far. The graphics are good, the fullness of the game seems good  and I look forward to the next level. It’s got a feel of the Sims/Theme hospital to it which is good!
Update.
I’m still loving this game but find it confusing. I’m stuck at 68% and it’s asking me to complete cleared rounds. I can kill a boss and do say 3 levels and it’s still 68%. LOVE it but its confuddled me. ( dev was very helpful). It’s still confusing as it will say  level completed but you have to go back in again and redo it.    

Update to 6 stars. This game is great to dip into or spend a couple of hours playing. The puzzles get quite tricky later on but the games levels are fine for any age. Im at 87% now and still look forward to playing it each day. 
If this was like Mario and sold with the question unit it would be liked by all concerned. Love it!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for such an incredible review and for staying with us through your journey! 🧡
We love how you described the game as a mix of The Sims and Theme Hospital—what a compliment!
If you ever get stuck or confused about progression, please don’t hesitate to reach out to us on our official Discord. We’re always happy to help!

We’re thrilled that you’ve made it to 87% and still loving it every day!
Your kind words give our whole team energy. 💪

Thank you again and see you in the next level! 🎮✨

reviews.review_description: I'm still doing it in the first world, but it feels like I'm doing a mystery puzzle with cute dolls. It's nice graphics to play with a mixed reality background, and I'm still doing it comfortably so it's not that difficult.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, Carpedian! 🌸 We’re delighted to hear that you’re enjoying the cozy mystery-puzzle feeling with our cute agents. The early worlds are meant to be relaxing, but as you progress, you’ll encounter new challenges and surprises that keep the adventure exciting. We hope you continue to have fun discovering them, and if you ever want to share feedback or ideas, please feel free to join our Discord community through the game lobby. 🎀

reviews.review_description: Finally a hidden picture game on vr i love playing them on my phone and had been looking for one for my quest 3 and this is the only one i have been able to find and its good so far thank you for making this game!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much, cruzyduck25! 🌟 We’re thrilled that you were looking for a hidden picture game on Quest 3 and found ours. Hidden picture games are such a fun way to slow down, explore carefully, and enjoy those little “aha!” moments—and we hope you’ll take your time to relax and discover every detail we’ve hidden for you. 💫 Your support means a lot to us, and we’ll keep working hard to bring you even more exciting adventures in the future. 💖

reviews.review_description:
It's an ok game, I get frustrated at some of the controls.
Its alright if you want to slow down with a puzzle type game, packed quiet a bit of unique things in there as well.

developer_response.body:
Hi Stalker001122,
Thank you for your honest feedback. 🙏 We understand that some of the controls may feel frustrating, and we’re always looking for ways to improve them. If you have any suggestions or ideas on how the controls could feel better, we’d love to hear them in our Discord community (accessible directly from the game lobby).
We’re also glad you enjoyed the unique puzzle elements—we designed them so players can enjoy the game at their own pace. We hope you’ll continue exploring Agent Q’s missions, and your feedback will help us make the experience even better.

reviews.review_description:
The game and the puzzles are a lot of fun and the graphics and mixed reality R are excellent. It's a lot of fun, except for the last part of the first world with the Giant Tumai. I can't get through this part because it's a game that I don't like at all and I'm just too slow for this game or the game is too fast for me. Unfortunately for me, this means that I can't manage the last level and I don't feel like trying for hours, so the game is probably over for me now. It would be great if the other worlds were unlocked, even if I can't solve a mission or a puzzle.
If I had known that the last part of the world had to do with speed and that there were no skip options to continue playing the game, I probably wouldn't have bought it. Too bad.
Please include a skip solution button in an update so that you can still continue playing if you fail a mission, or unlock the other worlds so that you can skip this part.

addendum:
I tried again today with x attempts
but no matter what I try I can't win the boss fight. This is very frustrating as I want to keep playing. The rest of the game would be 5 stars. Please open the worlds without having to play the boss fights, then I would also give 5 stars.

edit
back to 5 stars, according to the answer below. Looking forward to July 🤩
thank you so much 😊

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your honest feedback, frezo88. We're truly sorry the Giant Tumai battle felt like a blocker — we hear you.

The good news: In our upcoming July update, boss fights will become an optional mode, no longer required to progress. Instead, you’ll enjoy a cinematic cutscene and continue your puzzle adventure seamlessly. This change is part of our effort to respect players’ pacing and reduce frustration in an otherwise relaxing game.

We truly hope you’ll give it another shot then. Thank you again for playing! 💛

reviews.review_description: Fun for all ages 😁

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, APEboys! 😍
We’re delighted that you see Agent Q as fun for all ages—it means our puzzles can bring joy to everyone. Your smiley made our whole team smile too!

reviews.review_description: Loving the secret stage levels but the haunted ones won't Open.  I have done all the rest, what's  going on?

developer_response.body:
Hi RobbieNZ,
Thank you so much for your love and support for Hidden Pictures: Agent Q! 💛

To unlock the secret stages, you'll need to complete the regular stages within the same theme. For example, once you’ve cleared all 16 stages in the Museum area, the 5 Museum Secret Stages will become available. To access the regular stages, head to the right side of the lobby (toward the car) and you'll be able to enter from there.

If you're trying to unlock the Haunted (Halloween) secret stages, make sure you've completed all 16 regular Haunted stages first. Once that's done, the 5 secret levels should open up!

If you’ve already done that and they're still not opening, please let us know via a review or over on our Discord(https://discord.gg/EWRyK9dc) — we’ll look into it right away and work on resolving any issues.

Thanks again for playing! 👻🕵️‍♂️

reviews.review_title: A Fun and Surprising Puzzle Adventure!
reviews.review_description:
I started playing Hidden Pictures: Agent Q just out of curiosity, but I quickly got hooked! The visuals are super charming—each scene looks like a miniature model, and it feels like you're playing with a tiny, detailed world right in your room. It's really fun and immersive.

There are lots of hidden objects to find, and the puzzles come in all kinds of styles. Every level made me want to figure it out on my own. If you enjoy using your brain, this game is definitely for you.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your lovely review, KenLin! 🧠🏡✨
We’re thrilled that you enjoyed the miniature world feel and the variety of puzzles — that “tiny world in your room” vibe is exactly what we hoped players would feel!
We’re so glad Agent Q sparked your curiosity and turned it into a full-blown adventure. 🕵️‍♀️🔍💫
Thanks again for exploring with us!

reviews.review_description: Should be in you quest library already is a hidden gem

developer_response.body:
Hello Anthony9021 👋
You found us — welcome to the Agents Club 🕵️‍♂️✨
Thank you so much for the love and support you’ve shown for our game!
We really appreciate it, and we hope you have an amazing time playing Hidden Pictures: Agent Q 😊

reviews.review_description: I love this game. I didn't expect to love it as much as I do but I have come back to play it as I'm determined to finish. The game mechanics work well and honestly the game is simple. You either find objects to get orb shards or solve puzzles to protect the orb. I find it wildly entertaining and well worth a play.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, GoddessRobin! 🧡🔍✨
We're thrilled to hear you keep coming back — that's one of the best compliments we could hope for!
Your determination to finish and your kind words about the mechanics truly mean a lot to us.
We’ll keep working hard to make every mission feel worth returning to. 🚀🧩🌟

reviews.review_description:
Great puzzle game.
The dioramas are very detailed and feels like alive environments.
The mini-games found are very easy in the beginning, but they get harder in the next ones.
So detailed, so beautiful and so fun game.
Recommended.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, MontoMonto! 🌟
We’re really happy to hear you enjoyed the puzzles and the diorama-style environments. Our team put a lot of love into making each level feel alive and engaging.
More updates are coming this summer with new stages and even more detailed adventures, so please stay tuned!
We truly appreciate your recommendation! 😊🧩

reviews.review_description: I absolutely loved playing this game. So cute and fun. Beautiful miniatures. I would’ve given five stars had I been able to finish it. Got all the way to the final boss. I just couldn’t figure out what the premise was with the hits. I must’ve tried 30 times. I could watch the counter with my hits go up, would have a score of 1500 and then at the end it would show zero hits and my mission was failed.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your honest and heartfelt review, Resist2025! 🌟🐾
We’re so glad you enjoyed the game and made it all the way to the final boss — that means a lot to us!
We’re very sorry about the confusion with the hit system and are looking into ways to make the boss mechanics clearer and more intuitive.
Your feedback helps us improve. Thanks for sticking with us! 💪🛠️

reviews.review_description: I held back on making a review because the game takes a little time to get familiar. Once I grasped that then there was no stopping me. I'm a mature adult and thought initially that this was a little childish for me. It's actually child like which is very different to childish. I read some OP saying the game was too easy. I found the initial games easy but as I went deeper into the game then it became more challenging. The game is pleasing on the eye and is very comfortable to play seated. You have the option to move the game up and down and around. Learn how to do it as it's important. You get to collect things along the way as you are trying to fix orbs and capture villains. What more do you want from a game. Perfect for erm cough cough adults or for the kids. Either way you'll have loads of fun emerging yourself in this very unique MR VR game and for the price it's a bargain!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, cryborg13, for your thoughtful and wonderfully written review!
We absolutely loved how you described the game as "child-like, not childish" — that really captures the spirit we aimed for.
We’re thrilled that the deeper levels brought the challenge you were looking for, and we're glad you took the time to learn the MR mechanics to fully enjoy the experience.
It means the world to us that adults and kids alike can find joy in Agent Q’s adventure. Your words truly made our day!

reviews.review_description: I love relaxing VR games like this where you can stay seated.  It’s great that you can adjust the height of the puzzle so it lines up to your seat height. A lot of games claim you can play sitting but then there’s no option for adjustment or the adjustment isn’t low enough. This is my new favorite game for sure

developer_response.body:
Thank you, SiennaOliver! 🌟😊
It means so much to us that you're enjoying the game! Hope you continue to have a fun and relaxing time with it. Keep playing, and we’ll see you again soon! 🚀🎮

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: The developer response was quick and worked. Love the 3d animation and it is just fun. Needs just little tweaks like not the same items on each platform like the ice cream, book, toilet paper roll. Mix it up so it is not so obvious. 

 Is there a reason that no matter what I do with the controllers I can't get past the second blue globe? Tried every comb available and search the website for help but found nothing. If I can't get past this I will need to return the game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, LDPLET, for updating your review and giving us a second chance!
We’re really glad the fix worked and that you’re enjoying the animation and gameplay.
Also, we truly appreciate your suggestion about item variety — we’re working on ways to make each platform feel more dynamic and surprising.
Thanks again for the honest feedback and for sticking with Agent Q!

reviews.review_title: One of the best VR games
reviews.review_description: I just started last stage. Every level is more unique end enjoyable. The 5 hacking games are getting harder but not impossible. Are there any more levels on the horizon, near future? What is the pirate tower good for? Please keep up the good work, lot of people depending on fun relaxing games like Agent Q.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Sandspider, for your kind review!
We’re so happy you're enjoying the game. 😊
New levels are coming — we’re aiming for early summer.
The Pirate Tower can be placed in your space using Layout Mode in MR. Hope you enjoy that too!
Thanks again for playing!

reviews.review_title: A Game Not To Be Hidden.
reviews.review_description: This is a great quality polished game. I love the  way you interact with the characters and they interact with you.  It's quite funny as well as very cute.  I am only in the early stages so the puzzles are not too challenging, but I feel they will soon become harder, but hopefully not impossible.  Looking forward to progressing with this one. Well done Devs....

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Magicmerlin007! 🧙‍♂️✨
We’re so happy you’re enjoying the interactions and charm of the characters — that balance of fun and cute is exactly what we aimed for. 🐾🎈
We hope the puzzles keep you smiling as they gradually grow more challenging.
Thanks again for your kind words and support. We’ll keep doing our best! 🚀💚

reviews.review_description:
I'm glad I gave the game a chance about 2 weeks ago, because it turned out to be a surprise gem. The look and sounds of the game are delightful to lose myself in for a nice relaxing short session here and there. I love that there actually seems to be a good amount of levels/ 'Mission' to play as well, on top of planty of hidden coins to find across nearly every given Mission.
That said, finding the hidden coins really is the only thing that offers anything resembling a challenge in the game, but that doesn't take away from enjoying how well crafted everything is and completing these simple non-taxing objectives across the game.
I even find the hacking mini-games ok, even if not the most enjoyable thing in the game (though luckily they seem very spread out, so not intrusive to the game's flow either).

So for those who can enjoy a simple, easy-going diarama 'point-&-click' "puzzler" that's great for any age group, this is definitely the hidden gem to pick up!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Teele891! 🌼🎮
We’re incredibly happy to hear that Agent Q turned out to be a delightful surprise for you.
Your kind words about the relaxing visuals and sounds, the missions, and the hidden coin hunting truly warm our hearts. 🍃💛
And thank you for your honest take on the hacking mini-games — we’ll continue to keep them balanced and non-intrusive.
We’re so glad you gave this little world a chance. 🧩🌟

reviews.review_description:
As soon as the title screen opened up I was hooked, great opening sequence that had my jaw dropping.
You just love these little characters and feel connected and want to help them through this scenario to defeat the space pirates.

Only a few missions in and I know this is something special we have in vr.
A great under the radar title that everyone should know about.
Bravo devs.

Update. Now completed the game and wow it was just an incredible adventure, one of the best I have played this year.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words, GizmoDemi!
It means a lot to us that you connected with the Muddles and felt immersed from the very beginning.
We’re honored that you consider Agent Q a hidden gem in VR — your encouragement truly keeps us going.
Thank you again for playing and cheering us on!

reviews.review_description: This game is very enjoyable. The animation is fantastic and each level is a unique experience. Puzzle solving along with clue finding come together perfectly. The control scheme is also top notch. You have the ability to move the entire environment sided to side and view it up close or at a distance. Also, it offers many levels to keep you busy for awhile. An easy 5 stars for sure.

developer_response.body:
Thank you, Edward! 🌟😊
We're thrilled that you're enjoying the game! We put a lot of effort into making each level a unique and immersive experience. More updates and new content are on the way, so stay tuned and keep having fun! 🚀🔍

reviews.review_description:
Woah.. this game is impressive! Love the presentation, art style… great graphics, great story, great sounds, very immersive! … very fun and enjoyable.


The start has you standing in a lift and having to authenticate yourself.. which is a nice touch.

You are manipulating the play area.. rotating, moving and zooming in and out, to find items that the little people (muddles), require that in return they give you items to help you solve the quest. You will occasionally get a hacking screen which is a series of simple, but enjoyable puzzle for you to solve.

Upon completion of a task, you get an enemy Tumai to collect, which gets added to your collection.

Eventually you will come up against a Boss, that you beat in a rhythm style game, where you punch incoming beats.

Throughout levels there is coins to find and collect, which you use to buy extra levels.

This is a beautiful and charming game, with cuteness and fun… I also like the little animations.

I highly recommend this game if you enjoy puzzle games, collection games or something that’s not too challenging and more fun and pleasing.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Agent Bloodangel1068! 🕵️‍♂️💫
We’re beyond thrilled that you enjoyed the art, sounds, puzzles, and the overall charm of the game. 🎨🔊🧩
Your detailed feedback made us smile — and we’re so happy to hear you felt truly immersed!
We hope you continue having fun collecting Tumai and exploring the world of Agent Q.
Thanks again for your mission report, Agent! 🌟🎒💥

reviews.review_title: A fun puzzle game. Easy to pick up.
reviews.review_description: It's a fun game with puzzles that are challenging but not too hard. The thing I love about it is that you can play it in short bursts without issues. You want to just play for just 20 minutes or so? You can easily do 2 or 3 missions in that amount of time. There's also a nice variety to the puzzles, so they don't get boring. And man, since I play it in short bursts, this game is going to last me a long time. I looked it up, and Google says it has 24 hours of total game time. That's awesome.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, T-Prime! 🌟😊

We’re so happy to hear that you’re enjoying the game in short bursts! One of our main goals was to make Hidden Pictures: Agent Q an experience where you can jump in and out anytime and still have fun.

It’s great to know that the puzzle variety keeps it interesting for you! As for the total playtime, it can vary quite a bit depending on the player’s pace and puzzle-solving style. On average, we estimate that most players will spend around 5-10 hours completing the game. Since it’s a puzzle game, individual playtimes can differ, which makes every player’s experience unique! 🚀🎮

Hope you keep enjoying your time with Hidden Pictures: Agent Q! Thanks again for the awesome review! 😊

reviews.review_description: This is a fun and relaxing game. Beautiful graphics, enjoyable storyline and gameplay, UNTIL... The Boss fights! Like many others, I don't understand the first boss fight so I can't get past the first level. I thought it was a 'beat saber' like game and though I scored over 800 points, the mission still failed. I don't understand how to play it and win. So we need instructions and can you make the bosses a little less ' bossy'? Ha! Other than that, this game is a gem!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! 🌟 We’re happy to hear you’re enjoying the Muddles and the game.

We understand that the boss fights can be challenging. We’re working on improving the instructions to make them clearer and will consider adjustments to keep the fights fun but fair.

We appreciate your support and will keep you updated on future improvements. Thanks for playing Hidden Pictures: Agent Q! 😊

reviews.review_description:
UPDATE: Regarding the coin count... I found it! It is already in the game. When on a mission, open the menu screen (Y button) and it shows the coin total for that mission as well as the current task we need to do. 

ORIGINAL REVIEW: I ❤️ this game! Super cute! I build miniature scenes so I'm a sucker for just about anything mini☺️. Playing this in MR mode is so cool. Looks like one of my real life miniature sets in front of me 😂.
Only one request.  I might be missing it, but i think there should be a coin total for each mission like in the corner or something(i.e.coins: 5/7 found). This way we don't miss any coins. Maybe something like this is already there, but I didn't see it. Not important by any means to add this though. Great job devs!

developer_response.body:
Thank you, Niki! ❤️😊

We’re so glad to hear you’re enjoying the game in MR mode! It’s great to know that the experience feels immersive for you. Also, thanks for your suggestion about the coin total—we’ll definitely share your feedback with our dev team!

And those heart emojis? They made our day! ❤️❤️❤️ Hope you keep having fun with Hidden Pictures: Agent Q! 🚀🔍🎮

reviews.review_description: This is probably one of the best games I've ever bought. There is so much detail in every level. I've finished the first lot of levels and am on the second map area. The controllers are easy. I am currently stuck on a certain level. But I feel so drawn in to the whole game that I don't actually mind being stuck. It's definitely a unique game   you should definitely get this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words, Gemma! 🌟 We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the game and noticing all the little details we worked hard on. 🎨 Sounds like you're embracing the challenge — we love that! Hope you have lots of fun exploring the rest of the game!🌍🔎

reviews.review_title: Love this game with one issue though
reviews.review_description: This game is brilliant but the boss fights are stupidly hard. I get over 1000 each time but still fail. Then you can't progress. Kids will struggle... There's a lack of clear instruction about exactly what to do.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, Phil!
We’re so glad you’re enjoying the game, but we hear you on the boss fights! We understand that they might feel too challenging, and we’re reviewing ways to make them more balanced and provide clearer instructions. We really appreciate your input and will work on improving the experience. Stay tuned for updates! 🚀🎮

reviews.review_description: Superb graphics and production you'll see in games like IEYTD make the gaming experience more immersive. The TOMAIs are very cute, too. I think it's a hidden gem for only $20! I wish there were more games like this! Salute the developers 👍

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing review, nohch! 🙌 It means a lot to hear you call our game a hidden gem. 💎 And we proudly return the salute right back to you! 🫡 We’ll keep working hard to bring you even more fun experiences in the future. Thanks again for your support! 🎮✨

reviews.review_title: Can't get past tutorial 2nd blue orb
reviews.review_description: I want to play this game but on tutorial 2nd blue orb is not there so can't do anything? Please help!!

developer_response.body:
Hi llgrotzinger! 👋
First of all, thank you so much for enjoying our game! 🎮💖
We've shared a video guide and step-by-step instructions on how to clear it in the Tips channel on our Discord.
🔗 Please check the link below for more details:
https://discord.com/channels/1342359331320102932/1372751825903681676/1372751825903681676
Thanks again! 🤗

reviews.review_description:
I so wanted to love this title as it combined hidden objects and puzzles but it’s just far too easy, especially the puzzle/hacking case.

I feel this game is suited for ages 5-12 but there was not rating on it as far as I could see

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest feedback, JimSwain! 🙏 We’re sorry to hear the puzzles felt too easy for you. The early stages are designed to ease players in, but the difficulty gradually ramps up as you progress — we hope the later cases will offer more of a challenge. ⚙️ Your thoughts mean a lot to us, so thank you again for sharing!

reviews.review_description: It's a lovely game. I can play it calmly and sensually. I play it while sitting comfortably on the sofa and feeling like I'm healing. It seems like a proper MR game is finally coming out.

developer_response.body:
Thank you, leesung82! ❤️😊
We’re so happy that you find the game calming and immersive! Creating a comfortable and enjoyable MR experience was one of our main goals, so your feedback means a lot. Hope you continue to have a relaxing and fun time playing Hidden Pictures: Agent Q! 🚀🎮

reviews.review_description: The game is very addictive, puzzles along with the search for items and coins, don't let me leave the game until I find them all 🤩🥳

developer_response.body:
Wow, that’s incredible! 🤩 We’re truly honored to see you complete every stage and find every single coin! Your dedication and passion for the game mean the world to us. 🎉

And we absolutely loved your video! Thank you for sharing your full playthrough—your attention to detail is amazing. We can’t wait to bring more updates and challenges your way! 🚀

reviews.review_description: Cute charactor, beatiful stage, a lot of content, more than 50 stages to play, fun puzzle to solve.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, pmak111! 🐾🌟
We’re so happy to hear you’re enjoying the cute characters, beautiful stages, and all the puzzle content we packed in.
There’s even more fun on the way — stay tuned! 🧩🎉💛

reviews.review_description: After a minor snafu installing, I got the game to run and I must say, it is well worth the wait.  Gorgeous and engaging, I can’t wait to see all it has to offer!

developer_response.body:
Thank you, MissKramerica! 🌟😊
So glad you’re enjoying it! Keep having fun, and we truly appreciate your support! 🚀🎮

reviews.review_description: I can't get past the training!  Is there a trick I'm missing?  The first part goes well, but the second task (of pushing/pulling) does nothing. Help.

developer_response.body:
Hi neutronstar28! 👋
Thanks so much for playing and reaching out! 🎮✨

It sounds like you're stuck on the second part of the training, especially the push/pull task.
This part can be a little tricky at first, but once you get the timing and positioning right, you’ll be able to clear it! 😊

We’ve shared a video guide and step-by-step tips in the Tips channel on our Discord, which should help you get through it.
🔗 You can join our Discord via the link below:
https://discord.gg/V5Ag3grV

If you’re still having trouble after checking it out, feel free to reach out again — we’re here to help! 💪💫
Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: I like This game. If you play in MRmode, you can play realisticaly. I was able to immerse myself for a long time while playing.

developer_response.body:
Thank you, cassterraVR! 🌟😊
We’re so happy to hear that you enjoyed the game and found it immersive in MR mode! Creating a realistic and engaging experience was our goal, so your feedback means a lot to us. Hope you keep having a great time with Hidden Pictures: Agent Q! 🚀🎮

reviews.review_description: I love this game. The story and gameplay is extraordinary. I recommend it to everyone who likes to play puzzles.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, Daisyedith! 🌸🧩💖
We’re incredibly honored that Hidden Pictures: Agent Q has become one of your favorite games!
It truly means the world to us that you loved both the story and gameplay.
Thanks again for recommending us — we’ll keep working hard to bring you even more fun! 🚀✨

reviews.review_description:
A nice little game.
Good graphisms and musics.
Maybe it could be a little more hard.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, JohnDeuf! 🎶🎨🌟
Your short but powerful review truly made our day.
We’re thrilled you enjoyed the graphics and music — and we’ll definitely keep your feedback about the difficulty in mind for future updates!
Thanks again for your amazing support! 🚀💬

reviews.review_description: Something different and fun!

developer_response.body:
Thank you, Reborn86! 🌟😊
So happy you’re enjoying it! If it feels different and fun, that means you truly understand what we aimed for as developers. Hope you keep having a great time with Hidden Pictures: Agent Q! 🚀🎮

reviews.review_description: I love this game. Just started playing, today, and I couldn’t stop. I like those puzzles and the minigames between them. Not every puzzle is easy,  it you can get a key for some help.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much, POWERGIRL! 🧩💖
We’re so happy to hear that you couldn’t stop playing!
It’s great to know you’re enjoying the mix of puzzles and minigames — and yes, those keys can be a lifesaver! 🔑😉
Thanks for joining Agent Q on this mysterious mission!
